title: EMF
description: EMF(Excuse Mine French) is a client sided Vanilla+ SMP modpack. It focuses on performance and QOL tweaks while playing.
body:
# Info
EMF(Excuse Mine French) is a Vanilla+ performance modpack that is specifically targeted toward SMP useage.

Keybinds like "Mute Microphone" and "Open World Map", and "Switch Item" and "Reload Shaders" will clash with eachother, EMF does not come with keybinds, so please change these.

Please read through all the mods used before using EMF on a server.

Cave mapping is disabled by default, see below.
![Cave Mapping Disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/138b8836cb01a6ce819fe58b3e6bb9ec0b9e37a5.png)
Though, some users have claimed seeing this enabled, so please check Xaero's Minimap's settings before using EMF.

This modpack was made by me for use in PureVanilla Simply.

# Todo

## Add when updated

- DashLoader ([RIP](https://github.com/alphaqu/DashLoader/issues/118#issuecomment-3650639505) :[)
- Roughly Searchable ([RIP](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-searchable/changelog#:~:text=Updated%202%20years%20ago) :[)
- Nuit (formerly FabricSkyboxes) (RIP? :[)
- Nuit Interop (formerly FabricSkyBoxes Interop) (already using Skyboxify)
- Effective ([RIP](https://github.com/Ladysnake/Effective/issues/342#issuecomment-4274138164) :[)
- Biome Particle Weather (No more GitHub, so I cant tell if this one is dead or not)
- Enhanced Block Entities (Dunno about this one, I have Better Block Entities)
- ThreadTweak
- Hey Wiki
- Architectury
- Replanter Plus
- Fusion (Connected Textures)
- Axolotl Buckets
- Map Link (formerly Remote Player Waypoints for Xaero's Map)
- SuperMartijn642's Config Lib
- Animatica
- InvMove
- WAIG: Where Am I Going
- Hold Easy Place
- Drip Sounds
- FastQuit
- SpinReset
- AntiGhost-2
- Litematica Enderchest Materials (RIP? :[)

## Consider adding

- Preventer

## Add when loader done

- Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR) and/or(i dunno the difference icl) Your Options Shall Be Saved (YOSBS)

# Story

The name came from the Kanye song. That's it.  

About 2 years ago [I](https://github.com/pastelrbx), under the pseudonym ["Sarah"](https://modrinth.com/user/sawwahhs_mods), released [Nilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nilla). (Which we have now beat in downloads!! 🎉)  
I suddenly stopped caring about Minecraft fully, until now recently.  
I started revamping Nilla until it was back to its original glory, and hope to continue doing so for a while.

# 3rd Party

I included 1 3rd party RP.  
As for VanillaTweaks, you can find their project [here](https://vanillatweaks.net).

# Why are you all the way down here?

Well, since you are here, I guess I can tell you my master plan.  
If EMF reaches $5(the minimum for charity), I will withdraw it all to The Trevor Project, hehe.  
I have no need for the money, and this is just a passion project.  
I don't have any high expectations, especially after my analytics dropped, but I just felt like I'd let you know.
